items.title: How to create an account
items.content: To create an account, click Sign Up, enter your email address, choose a password, and verify your email.

items.title: How to update your profile
items.content: Navigate to Account Settings and update your personal information. Changes are saved automatically.

items.title: How to delete your account
items.content: Contact support or visit Account Settings and select Delete Account. This action cannot be undone.

items.title: Reset your password
items.content: Click Forgot Password on the login screen and follow the instructions sent to your email.

items.title: Enable two-factor authentication
items.content: Go to Security Settings and enable two-factor authentication using an authenticator application.

items.title: Account locked after failed logins
items.content: Accounts are temporarily locked after multiple failed login attempts. Wait 15 minutes before trying again.

items.title: View invoices
items.content: Invoices are available under Billing History in your account dashboard.

items.title: Update payment method
items.content: Navigate to Billing Settings and add or update your credit card details.

items.title: Failed payment
items.content: If a payment fails, verify your card information and ensure sufficient funds are available.

items.title: Request a refund
items.content: Refund requests must be submitted within 30 days of purchase.

items.title: Refund processing time
items.content: Approved refunds are processed within 5 to 10 business days.

items.title: Refund eligibility
items.content: Refund eligibility depends on the product and subscription terms.

items.title: Upgrade your plan
items.content: You can upgrade your subscription at any time from the Subscription page.

items.title: Cancel subscription
items.content: Subscriptions can be cancelled from Account Settings before the next billing cycle.

items.title: Automatic renewals
items.content: Subscriptions renew automatically unless cancelled before the renewal date.

items.title: Track your order
items.content: Order tracking information is available from the Orders page once shipped.

items.title: Modify an order
items.content: Orders may be modified within one hour after placement.

items.title: Cancel an order
items.content: Orders can be cancelled before they enter fulfillment.

items.title: Shipping times
items.content: Standard shipping takes 3 to 7 business days depending on location.

items.title: International shipping
items.content: International shipping is available to selected countries.

items.title: Lost package
items.content: Contact support if your package has not arrived within the estimated delivery window.

items.title: Application not loading
items.content: Clear your browser cache and cookies, then try again.

items.title: Unable to upload files
items.content: Ensure your file size does not exceed the maximum upload limit.

items.title: Browser compatibility
items.content: The application supports the latest versions of Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge.

items.title: Generate API keys
items.content: API keys can be generated from the Developer Settings section.

items.title: API rate limits
items.content: The default API rate limit is 1000 requests per hour.

items.title: Authentication errors
items.content: Verify that your API key is active and included in the Authorization header.

items.title: Request personal data
items.content: Customers may request a copy of their personal data through the Privacy Center.

items.title: Delete personal data
items.content: Data deletion requests are processed within 30 days.

items.title: GDPR compliance
items.content: Our platform complies with GDPR requirements for data protection and privacy.
